title: COMMUNITY EDUCATION - 211info
text: HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hillsboro Medical Center offers community education classes and support groups. Classes include childbirth education, newborn care, infant massage, breastfeeding support, and first aid and CPR classes. 335 SE 8th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Class and support group times vary and may include the evening and weekends. Email (503) 681-1700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 681-1111 Main phone (503) 681-4357 Patient Relations (833) 851-5553 Billing (503) 681-1195 Medical Records (503) 494-5252 Helpline MyChart Support Main phone (503) 681-1700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to register FEES: Some classes are free, other have a fee; support groups are free. See website for information. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus #57 at 8th and Baseline stop, or MAX stop at 8th Avenue in Hillsboro Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education General Health Education Programs Weight Management Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER
